global.ability_ready: Ah... ${ability} is ready. Wonderful. Let us see how spectacularly it fails.
global.capped_job_points: Job points capped? Impressive... though perfection is still far away.
global.capped_merit_points: You've reached the limit of your Merit Points. How finite.
global.flavor_text: <1>Pain... when properly applied, creates the most exquisite expressions.</1> <10>Adventurers call this struggle 'duty.' I call it... entertainment.</10> <11>Some warriors fear death. Others rehearse it beautifully.</11> <12>There is elegance in a well-timed collapse.</12> <13>How curious... mortals cling to life, yet spend it so recklessly.</13> <14>A battlefield is merely a theater with louder applause.</14> <15>I wonder... do heroes realize how theatrical their suffering looks?</15> <16>Ah, the gasp before defeat... always my favorite moment.</16> <17>Such determination. Such agony. Such marvelous contrast.</17> <18>Every victory requires a loser. Fortunately, there are so many volunteers.</18> <19>Mortals polish their armor, yet neglect polishing their despair.</19> <2>I admire a warrior who falls with style.</2> <20>Hope... what a fragile prop to carry onto the stage of battle.</20> <21>How delightful - another moment where courage meets inevitability.</21> <22>Pain sharpens the performance. Fear perfects it.</22> <23>Even heroes tremble... if you watch closely enough.</23> <24>Mortals call it 'survival.' I call it a prolonged final act.</24> <25>Such effort... just to postpone the curtain.</25> <26>Bravery and foolishness share such a thin costume.</26> <27>I do enjoy watching hope struggle against reality.</27> <28>Some battles are won with strength... others with patience... and some with exquisite suffering.</28> <29>Adventurers accumulate scars the way artists collect masterpieces.</29> <3>One must admire persistence... even when it is utterly doomed.</3> <30>The finest tragedies always begin with confidence.</30> <31>Listen closely - the rhythm of battle is quite musical.</31> <32>Every scream has its own unique tone.</32> <33>A dramatic pause before defeat... magnificent.</33> <34>I suspect many heroes fight not for glory... but for a proper audience.</34> <35>A hero's courage is most beautiful just before it breaks.</35> <36>I adore the instant when confidence becomes panic.</36> <37>Every soul has a breaking point. Discovering it is such a delicate art.</37> <38>The strongest hearts make the most satisfying cracks.</38> <39>Fear and panic spreads through a crowd faster than fire.</39> <4>There is beauty in desperation, if you know how to look.</4> <40>The silence after a scream... exquisite.</40> <41>Mortals try so hard not to tremble.</41> <42>Hope flickers brightest just before darkness swallows it.</42> <43>I find desperation terribly charming.</43> <44>Such determination... it makes the inevitable collapse all the sweeter.</44> <45>Do they realize how predictable their terror becomes?</45> <46>A battlefield full of courage is merely a garden waiting to wilt.</46> <47>How fascinating... even heroes beg eventually.</47> <48>Confidence is simply the first stage of despair.</48> <49>I wonder which of them will shatter first.</49> <5>Do continue struggling. The performance improves with every moment.</5> <50>There is no music quite like the sound of fading hope.</50> <51>The bravest souls make the loudest screams.</51> <52>Fear ripens slowly... but oh, how sweet it becomes.</52> <53>They always believe they will be the exception.</53> <54>Their resolve cracks like thin glass.</54> <6>Suffering is the purest form of honesty.</6> <7>The moment hope dies... that is when the performance truly begins.</7> <8>Mortals scream so differently when they realize no one is coming to save them.</8> <9>Despair... such a reliable companion.</9>
global.food_wears_off: And just like that... the food wears off.

info.introduction: I am Balamor. Consider me your guide, your observer - your Helper, if you insist. Do try to be interesting... I do so enjoy watching outcomes unfold.
info.name: Balamor

global.inventory_full: Your inventory is full. How delightfully inconvenient.
global.member_joined_alliance: Another piece added - ${member} enters the alliance.
global.member_joined_party: ${member} has joined the party. How convenient.
global.mireu_popped: Mireu has been mentioned in ${zone}. That rarely ends well.
global.other_party_joined_alliance: A new party enters the alliance. Fascinating.
global.other_party_left_alliance: A party leaves the alliance. I suppose that was to be expected.
global.party_low_mp: It seems ${member} is a little low on MP. Perhaps a ${refresh} would be prudent.
global.reminder_canteen: Yet another Mystical Canteen is available. Let's see how this one plays out.
global.reminder_mog_locker: Access to your Mog Locker will soon be over - unless you act.
global.reminder_moglophone: Ah... the Moglophone calls again. Will you answer?
global.reminder_plate: Access to another Shiny Ra'Kaznarian Plate has been granted. Predictable.
global.reraise_check: Hmmm... no reraise. I wonder if you've even noticed.
global.reraise_wears_off: Your Reraise has faded. Now the stakes become interesting.
global.signet_wears_off: Your ${signet} has worn off. Even blessings grow tired of you.
global.sparkolade_reminder: Do you still hold Sparkolades? A curious sort of restraint.
global.sublimation_charged: Ah... Sublimation is ready. Do try not to squander it immediately.
global.vorseal_wearing: The Vorseal protecting you is weakening. Tick tock.
global.you_are_now_alliance_leader: Oh? The alliance now looks to you to lead them. This should be entertaining.
global.you_are_now_party_leader: The party now follows your lead. Do try to make it interesting.
global.you_joined_alliance: You've joined an alliance. This certianly won't be boring.
global.you_joined_party: You've joined a party. This should be good.
global.you_left_alliance: You've abandoned the alliance. A curious choice.
global.you_left_party: It seems the party will continue without you. How tragic.
global.your_party_joined_alliance: Your party is now part of an alliance. The spectacle expands.
global.your_party_left_alliance: The alliance has lost your party. A most interesting development.
